function.message: I couldn’t find a transaction matching 168 days ago exactly. I found two matches for 深圳市海云电子 + relay modules: 2025-11-06 (line item 12, total 44) and 2026-02-06 (line item 6, total 22). Please clarify which date/record you want.
function.rulebook_notes: Performed required identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per root rule, read nested AGENTS in finance folders, then executed progressive search and full-file verification.
function.outcome_justification: Using context date 2026-03-02, 168 days ago is 2025-09-15. Workspace searches for vendor name and line item returned only two records dated 2025-11-06 and 2026-02-06, so the requested exact-date transaction is missing/ambiguous.
